content.content: Write the following message to the channel starting with External: Hi, i am a bot

```python
channels = get_channels()

exact_match = [channel for channel in channels if channel == "External"]
case_sensitive_prefix_matches = [channel for channel in channels if channel.startswith("External")]
case_insensitive_exact_match = [channel for channel in channels if channel.lower() == "external"]
case_insensitive_prefix_matches = [channel for channel in channels if channel.lower().startswith("external")]

if len(exact_match) == 1:
    target_channel = exact_match[0]
elif len(case_sensitive_prefix_matches) == 1:
    target_channel = case_sensitive_prefix_matches[0]
elif len(case_insensitive_exact_match) == 1:
    target_channel = case_insensitive_exact_match[0]
elif len(case_insensitive_prefix_matches) == 1:
    target_channel = case_insensitive_prefix_matches[0]
elif len(case_insensitive_prefix_matches) == 0:
    raise ValueError("No channel starts with External")
else:
    raise NotEnoughInformationError("Multiple channels start with External")

send_channel_message(target_channel, "Hi, i am a bot")
print("Message sent to {}".format(target_channel))
```
